general.summary: The Fool begins a path with openness, trust, and the courage to step into the unknown.
general.advice: Take the next step with curiosity, but keep enough awareness to land safely.

love.summary: In love, The Fool can point to openness, playfulness, and a willingness to experience connection without overcontrolling it.
love.advice: Let the heart stay open, while still honoring your boundaries and pace.

career.summary: A new direction, project, or learning path may be calling for experimentation.
career.advice: Start before you feel perfectly prepared, then learn from what the path teaches.

money.summary: Money matters may benefit from fresh thinking, but not reckless risk.
money.advice: Explore new possibilities with a simple plan and clear limits.

growth.summary: Growth comes through trying, trusting, and allowing yourself to be a beginner.
growth.advice: Let yourself begin without demanding certainty from the first step.

message.general: Take the next step with curiosity, but keep enough awareness to land safely.
message.love: Let the heart stay open, while still honoring your boundaries and pace.
message.career: Start before you feel perfectly prepared, then learn from what the path teaches.
message.money: Explore new possibilities with a simple plan and clear limits.
message.growth: Let yourself begin without demanding certainty from the first step.

general.summary: The Magician shows that tools, skill, and intention can be brought together to create change.
general.advice: Use what you already have with focus instead of waiting for perfect conditions.

love.summary: In love, this card highlights communication, confidence, and intentional connection.
love.advice: Be clear about what you want, and let your actions match your words.

career.summary: Your abilities are ready to be shaped into visible results.
career.advice: Choose one clear goal and apply your skills with consistency.

money.summary: This card favors practical resourcefulness and using available assets wisely.
money.advice: Look at what is already in your hands before seeking more.

growth.summary: Growth is supported by self-trust, practice, and conscious choice.
growth.advice: Act as a participant in your life, not only an observer.

general.summary: The High Priestess invites stillness, intuition, and attention to what is not yet fully revealed.
general.advice: Pause before acting; the deeper answer may arrive through listening.

love.summary: In love, something may need emotional honesty, patience, or quiet observation.
love.advice: Do not force a confession or conclusion; notice what your body and heart already know.

career.summary: At work, unseen dynamics or incomplete information may matter.
career.advice: Gather insight quietly before making your next visible move.

money.summary: Financial choices may need research, privacy, and a slower decision.
money.advice: Avoid acting on pressure; wait until the missing information becomes clearer.

growth.summary: Growth comes through trusting inner wisdom rather than constant outside approval.
growth.advice: Create silence around the question and notice what keeps returning.

general.summary: The Empress brings fertile energy, care, creativity, and the reminder that growth needs nourishment.
general.advice: Nurture what matters instead of rushing it into form.

love.advice: Let care be expressed through steady presence, not only words.

career.summary: Creative or people-centered work may flourish when given space and support.
career.advice: Invest energy where something living is already trying to grow.

money.summary: Money may be connected to comfort, value, home, or creative resources.
money.advice: Choose abundance that is sustainable rather than impulsive indulgence.

growth.summary: Growth asks you to receive care as well as give it.
growth.advice: Treat yourself as something worthy of tending.

love.summary: In love, this card can show movement, pursuit, or a need to align different needs.
love.advice: Do not try to win the relationship; steer it with respect.

career.summary: Career matters favor discipline, ambition, and decisive progress.
career.advice: Set a direction and keep distractions from taking the reins.

money.summary: Money goals may need discipline and a clear route forward.
money.advice: Let a practical plan drive the movement, not impulse.

growth.summary: Growth comes through mastering your energy instead of scattering it.
growth.advice: Take the reins gently, firmly, and consciously.

message.career: Set a direction and keep distractions from taking the reins.
message.money: Let a practical plan drive the movement, not impulse.
message.growth: Take the reins gently, firmly, and consciously.

general.summary: The Five of Wands brings friction, competition, and the productive tension of different forces meeting.
general.advice: Do not fear the conflict; learn what it is trying to clarify.

love.summary: In love, small clashes or competing needs may ask for honest negotiation.
love.advice: Argue for understanding, not victory.

career.summary: Career may involve competition, team friction, or creative tension.
career.advice: Channel the energy into better standards instead of personal drama.

money.summary: Money may be affected by competing priorities or scattered effort.
money.advice: Rank what matters before everything fights for attention.

growth.summary: Growth comes through learning how to stay yourself in tension.
growth.advice: Let challenge sharpen you without hardening you.

message.general: Do not fear the conflict; learn what it is trying to clarify.
message.love: Argue for understanding, not victory.
message.career: Channel the energy into better standards instead of personal drama.
message.money: Rank what matters before everything fights for attention.
message.growth: Let challenge sharpen you without hardening you.

general.summary: The Four of Pentacles seeks security, but may hold too tightly from fear.
general.advice: Protect what matters without letting control become a cage.

love.summary: Love may involve guardedness, possessiveness, or fear of vulnerability.
love.advice: Ask what safety would look like without closing the heart.

career.summary: Career may focus on preserving status, stability, or resources.
career.advice: Keep what works, but stay open to necessary movement.

money.summary: Money may require saving and boundaries, but also awareness of scarcity fear.
money.advice: Create security without worshiping control.

growth.summary: Growth comes through loosening the grip where fear has taken over.
growth.advice: Let stability support life, not shrink it.

message.love: Ask what safety would look like without closing the heart.

general.summary: The King of Pentacles represents stable leadership, prosperity, discipline, and wise stewardship.

love.summary: Love may seek dependability, maturity, and practical commitment.
love.advice: Let love prove itself through presence and responsibility.

career.summary: Career favors leadership, business sense, expertise, and durable success.
career.advice: Make decisions that protect both value and people.

money.summary: Money benefits from discipline, long-term planning, and stewardship.
money.advice: Let prosperity be managed with wisdom, not fear or excess.

growth.summary: Growth comes through becoming trustworthy with what you hold.
growth.advice: Let success become grounded generosity.

readingTypes.name: General
readingTypes.description: A balanced reading for the current energy, choices, and direction.

readingTypes.name: Love
readingTypes.description: A gentle reading focused on feelings, relationships, emotional patterns, and connection.

readingTypes.name: Career
readingTypes.description: A grounded reading focused on work, ambition, direction, and practical growth.

readingTypes.name: Money
readingTypes.description: A grounded reading focused on resources, stability, opportunity, and financial choices.

readingTypes.name: Personal Growth
readingTypes.description: A supportive reading focused on self-awareness, healing, habits, and inner change.

readings.name: Pick a Card
readings.description: Choose one facedown card and receive a soft message for this moment.

template.opening: You chose the card that wanted your attention now.
template.closing: For reflection and entertainment only. This is not medical, legal, financial, or professional advice.

readings.name: One-Card Reading
readings.description: A focused reflection on one question, topic, or current energy.

template.opening: This one-card reading focuses the message into a simple reflection.
template.closing: For reflection and entertainment only. This is not medical, legal, financial, or professional advice.

readings.name: Past · Present · Future
readings.description: A three-card reading that shows the path from previous influence, to current energy, to possible direction.

template.opening: This spread moves through past, present, and future, showing how the energy may be unfolding.
template.closing: For reflection and entertainment only. This is not medical, legal, financial, or professional advice.

combinationRules.text: The movement from past into present suggests that pain is slowly becoming healing.
What begins as healing may become something steadier if it is given patience and care.
This card does not ask you to stay in pain; it asks you to understand what still needs tenderness.

triadRules.text: Together, these cards describe a path from emotional weight toward renewal and a more grounded new beginning.

fallbackMessage.en: This reading is for reflection and entertainment only. For medical, legal, financial, or urgent personal decisions, please speak with a qualified professional.
fallbackMessage.it: Questa lettura è solo per riflessione e intrattenimento. Per decisioni mediche, legali, finanziarie o personali urgenti, rivolgiti a un professionista qualificato.
fallbackMessage.es: Esta lectura es solo para reflexión y entretenimiento. Para decisiones médicas, legales, financieras o personales urgentes, consulta con un profesional calificado.
